title: Side Menu Item
description: Interface defining the structure of a side menu item with support for nested children, routing, and various states.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title for the menu item.

props.name: routerLinkActive
props.description: CSS class(es) to apply when the router link is active.

props.name: routerLinkActiveOptions
props.description: Options for router link active matching.

props.name: target
props.description: Link target attribute for external links.

props.name: text
props.description: Display text for the menu item.

props.name: active
props.description: Whether the menu item is in active state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the menu item is disabled.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Whether the menu item is in loading state.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon identifier for the menu item.

props.name: data
props.description: Custom data associated with the menu item.

props.name: suffixText
props.description: Additional text to display after the main text.

props.name: toggleOnClick
props.description: Whether clicking the item should toggle its collapsed state.
